claimComponent: alignment between mechanism evidence and holdout behavior
rivalTheory: source artifact or measurement process explains the observation
expectedObservation: NR-CAND-061 weakens under a stronger baseline or rival artifact check.
expectedBaselineResult: stronger baseline explains part of signal
falsifier: Fresh holdout in Scientific software reproduction fragility matches the rival baseline or produces no nontrivial separation.
noEditRule: Frozen before execution; post-hoc prediction edits invalidate readiness scoring.
